comments.text: Iceland is one of the few countries that truly proves prosperity isn't just about money—it's about trust, equality, and quality of life. Amazing documentary! 🇮🇸

comments.author: @ChrisLauter-t3d
comments.text: I am so tired of other countries looking down upon America in their passive aggressive clips! I can promise, you will not find a more loving country and I think the World Cup has proven my point. Stop making America look bad we have our problems but what country doesn’t 25.42 crime in Iceland 49.2 in America let’s put that in perspective 400,000 people Iceland America 300 million people it looks like Iceland has more crime. But as an American, I’m not judging Iceland I think it’s a country. I would love to see before God calls me home. The World Cup has shown what true Americans are kind, loving, supportive and genuinely really wanna get to know people from other countries. The reason why most of us don’t have passports is because America has everything. You could spend a lifetime trying to see America and not quite be able to do it. Before you judge us, you should come visit. You’ll leave with a smile on your Face and new friends in your phone.

replies.author: @ChrisLauter-t3d
replies.text: Colombia not Columbia sometimes my phone changes spelling. I probably should’ve proofread this, but I didn’t again thank you for the question.

replies.author: @ChrisLauter-t3d
replies.text: I traveled the world. I’ve lived in Germany for four years. I’ve been to Great Britain France, Amsterdam. I’ve been to Columbia, Brazil, and I have a condo in Panama. The biggest misconception about America is everybody carries guns on the streets, even though I own a few guns I’ve never felt the need to carry a gun on the street, but I could if I wanted to because our constitution gives that right to us as Americans. What I love about this country is its patriotism. It’s genuine love for other cultures, and it’s never ending questions about other countries. We don’t know or do we judge other countries. The reason why America gets picked on so much is because if the truth got out 70% of the world would want to move here! I lived in California for a while San Francisco was where I lived. I was 20 minutes from the beach three hours from Tahoe, maybe 3 1/2 hours to the Sierra Nevada in four hours from a little town I’d love called Wilsonia California. This little town is in the heart of the giant redwoods. I would love if you ever had a chance to come to America and ever come to Ohio I would show you things about Ohio that would just make your brain shut down. Texas is bigger than the Great Britain you can drive from one end of Eastern Europe to the other and wouldn’t make it halfway through Texas. Even though soccer isn’t a huge sport yet in America, I challenge you to go online and look at what people from all over the world are saying about America. Nearly half of the people that came here for the World Cup were afraid that they were gonna get jumped or robbed or raped, and none of that occurred only hugs and endless conversations, along with people that live in eastern Europe, did not want to go back home. I’ll leave you with this thought, I watched a video of this man almost crying because he was able to walk in our beloved Capital and saw how friendly people were and how beautiful the homes were, but he said something that stuck with me and that was he couldn’t do this in his own country of South Africa because he would’ve more than likely been robbed stabbed, and then his girlfriend said and raped. You can’t walk down the streets in South Africa because you would either die or get robbed. I don’t know if you’ve ever been to America but I can promise you once people find out you’re from another country far away. They will do everything in their power to make you feel at home and if you’re lucky enough to meet somebody out having dinner somewhere I can promise you somebody will pay for your dinner. It breaks my heart that the news media has portrayed my beautiful country like we are a bunch of spoiled little brats in crime is so bad you probably won’t make it home. I don’t understand why news media does this but they do and it’s obvious there’s a reason behind that and I think it’s because if it got out that we were the opposite of what governments and news agencies are saying about America, they would lose a substantial amount of people trying to become American citizens. The reason why everything is bigger it’s not to show off. It’s because in America we have people to our homes and have dinner parties and when you see the over the top stores like Sam’s Club or Costco what people don’t understand about these two stores is restaurants do their shopping there. That’s why everything sold is in big amounts now don’t give me wrong. I have seven children that are adults right Now and I’m very proud of the men and woman they become. Each and everyone of my children continually to add to our economy by spending money that is worked for. I promise you this is my last paragraph, I had a dinner party out at my house last weekend. There were 16 couples and we took Europe and divided Europe into their countries wrote it on a piece of paper each country put it in a hat, whatever country you pulled out out of the hat you had to cook something that represents that part of Europe. I live on 13 acres of land. I have a log cabin with two barn, chickens couple goats and that’s it. I am retired now I spent 34 years at the same job and now I can enjoy my life because I saved and planned for my retirement. Nothing was given to me or my family. I’m gonna offer this again to you. Look me up on YouTube if you’re ever in America and you wanna come through Ohio, I will show you the best time you’ve ever had. I’ll invite my friends my buddy has a flatbed truck and another buddy has a band. Will put them on the flatbed truck and will show you the America that news and governments will never tell you about. I hope I didn’t write too much. I love this country. I thought for this country. I took two bullets for this country while in combat, you will never find more patriotic people on the planet than you will in America. I hope one day you’re able to come here and experience it for yourself and better yet. I look forward to the day that you tell the truth about America not that I think you’re lying. I just know that what they put on the news isn’t the truth. God bless you and your family! Because at the end of the day, family is truly the only thing that matters thank you. My name is Chris.

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: Thank you for the passionate response and for bringing those statistics into perspective! 🇺🇸 Every country definitely faces its own unique set of challenges, and it wasn't our intention to single out or make any place look bad. Given the data you shared, what do you think is the biggest misconception people from other countries have about daily life in America?
